channel.title: Tutorials on AI Gas - AI Tools Reviews, Tutorials & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorials on AI Gas - AI Tools Reviews, Tutorials & Guides

item.title: AI Code Assistants Comparison: Boost Your Development Speed
item.description: Compare the best AI code assistants to supercharge your development workflow. 💻 Top AI Code Assistants 1. GitHub Copilot ($10-19/month) Best for: Professional developers and teams Features: Code completion, chat interface, CLI tool Commission: 15% recurring 2. Amazon CodeWhisperer (Free-$19/month) Best for: AWS users and enterprise Features: AWS integration, security scanning, free tier Commission: 20% recurring 3. Tabnine ($12-39/month) Best for: Individual developers Features: Local model option, privacy focused, multiple IDEs Commission: 25% recurring

item.title: Complete Guide to AI Image Generation Tools 2026
item.description: Learn how to create stunning AI art with the best image generation tools. 🎨 Top AI Image Generators 1. Midjourney ($10-120/month) Best for: Professional artists and designers Features: Highest quality, artistic control, community Commission: 15% recurring 2. DALL-E 3 ($20-200/month) Best for: Realistic images and commercial use Features: Integration with ChatGPT, commercial license Commission: 10% recurring 3. Stable Diffusion (Free-$49/month) Best for: Developers and customization Features: Open source, local installation, custom models Commission: 20% for premium services

item.title: AI for SEO: Complete Guide to Ranking with AI Tools
item.description: Learn how to use AI tools to dominate search engine rankings. 🔍 AI SEO Tools 1. Content Optimization Surfer SEO ($59-199/month): AI content editor Frase ($14-114/month): Content briefs and optimization Clearscope ($170-350/month): Content scoring 2. Keyword Research SEMrush ($119-449/month): Complete SEO suite Ahrefs ($99-999/month): Backlink analysis Moz Pro ($99-599/month): All-in-one SEO 💰 SEO Service Pricing 1. SEO Audit Services Website audit: $500-2000 Competitor analysis: $1000-3000 Strategy development: $2000-5000 2. Content SEO Keyword research: $300-800 Content optimization: $50-200/page Link building: $500-2000/month 🚀 Implementation Roadmap Month 1: Audit and strategy ($2000-4000) Month 2-3: Content creation ($3000-8000) Month 4-6: Link building ($2000-6000) Ongoing: Maintenance ($1000-3000/month)

item.title: ElevenLabs Voice AI: Complete Voice Generation Guide
item.description: ElevenLabs offers the most realistic AI voice generation available today. 🎙️ Features 1. Voice Cloning Clone any voice from 1 minute of audio Multiple languages supported Emotion and tone control 2. Text-to-Speech 100+ natural sounding voices Adjustable speech parameters API access for developers 💰 Commercial Applications 1. Audiobook Production Convert books to audiobooks: $500-5000/book Podcast voiceovers: $100-500/episode Educational content: $50-200/hour 2. Voice Acting Services Character voices for games: $200-1000/character Commercial voiceovers: $100-500/spot IVR system voices: $500-2000/system 💸 Earnings Potential Affiliate Commission: 20% Average project value: $500-2000 Monthly potential: $2000-10000 Start with ElevenLabs →

item.title: GitHub Copilot Complete Guide: From Setup to Advanced Tips
item.description: GitHub Copilot is revolutionizing how developers write code. This complete guide covers everything from setup to advanced techniques. 🚀 Getting Started 1. Installation Install from Visual Studio Code Marketplace Sign in with GitHub account Choose subscription: Free for students, $10/month for individuals 2. Basic Usage Just start typing and Copilot suggests completions. Use Tab to accept suggestions. 💰 Monetization Opportunities 1. Copilot Consulting Help teams adopt Copilot: $100-200/hour Custom training workshops: $2000-5000/workshop Integration consulting: $5000-15000/project 2.

item.title: ChatGPT-4使用完全指南：从新手到高级技巧
item.description: ChatGPT-4是目前最强大的AI对话模型之一。本文将教你如何充分发挥它的潜力。 📖 基础使用 1. 注册与设置 访问 chat.openai.com 注册账号 选择 ChatGPT Plus 订阅（每月$20） 设置自定义指令，让 ChatGPT 记住你的偏好 2. 界面功能介绍 对话历史：左侧面板保存所有对话 模型切换：GPT-4、GPT-4 Turbo、GPT-3.5 插件市场：200+官方插件可选 文件上传：支持图片、PDF、Word、Excel等 🔧 高级功能 1. 自定义 GPTs 创建专属 GPTs：编程助手、写作教练、数据分析师 添加知识库：上传文档让 GPTs 学习 设置操作：连接到 API 和第三方服务 2. 提示工程技巧 你是一位资深 SEO 专家。请分析以下网页内容并： 1. 识别主要关键词 2. 建议标题优化方案 3. 推荐内链策略 4. 评估内容可读性 网页内容：[此处粘贴内容] 3. API 集成 import openai client = openai.OpenAI(api_key="your-api-key") response = client.chat.completions.create( model="gpt-4-turbo", messages=[ {"role": "system", "content": "你是一位专业的文案写手"}, {"role": "user", "content": "写一篇关于AI工具指南的引言"} ] ) 💼 实际应用场景 1.

item.title: Midjourney V6终极教程：从提示词到高级控制
item.description: Midjourney V6带来了革命性的图像生成能力。本指南将教你如何成为Midjourney专家。 🎨 快速入门 1. 加入 Midjourney 访问 midjourney.com 通过 Discord 使用（官方服务器或个人服务器） 选择订阅计划：Basic($10)、Standard($30)、Pro($60) 2. 基本命令 /imagine prompt: 一只可爱的猫在月球上跳舞 --ar 16:9 --v 6.0 3. 参数详解 --ar：宽高比（1:1, 16:9, 9:16等） --v：模型版本（6.0, 5.2, 5.1等） --s：风格化参数（0-1000） --q：质量（.25, .5, 1, 2） 🖌️ 提示词工程 1. 基础结构 [主体] + [动作] + [环境] + [风格] + [参数] 示例： 一位穿着太空服的宇航员在火星表面绘画，赛博朋克风格，霓虹灯光 --ar 3:2 --v 6.0 --s 750 2. 风格关键词 艺术风格：impressionism, surrealism, cyberpunk, steampunk 媒介风格：oil painting, watercolor, digital art, charcoal sketch 摄影风格：35mm film, cinematic, portrait photography, long exposure 渲染风格：Unreal Engine 5, Octane render, Pixar animation, Studio Ghibli 3.
